meaning: n.被除数,股息,红利,额外津贴,奖金,年息
examples: The first quarter dividend has been increased by nearly 4 percent.
Profit and dividend growth looks above average for the foreseeable future.
The high yields available on the dividend shares made them attractive to private investors.
Tax efficiency is super high because fund has little turnover and only small dividend income.
Instead, he gets a tiny dividend every time city folk spread peanut butter on their toast.
